topic_summary: The Los Angeles Lakers, without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, opened the 2026 NBA Playoffs on April 18 with a 107-98 Game 1 victory over the Houston Rockets, powered by a 19-point, 8-rebound, 13-assist performance from 41-year-old LeBron James.
proposition: LeBron James, at 41, is still a legitimate difference-maker capable of carrying a shorthanded Lakers team deep in the 2026 NBA Playoffs.

topic_summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder, winners of the 2025 NBA title and the NBA's top seed with a league-best 64-18 record, entered the 2026 NBA playoffs as heavy betting favorites at roughly plus-110 odds, attempting to become the first back-to-back champion since the Golden State Warriors in 2017-18.
proposition: The Oklahoma City Thunder will repeat as NBA champions in 2026.
